name: closed_loop_verify_task_outcome_writeback
description: A successful verify_task_outcome for an applied self-extension manifest should write one idempotent outcome KnowledgeCard.

expectedContract.successGate: failedCheckCount == 0 and manifest postcheck has descriptorSourceIntegrated, handlerSourceIntegrated, and registryPatchIntegrated true
expectedContract.idempotency: Calling verify_task_outcome again with the same manifest sessionId must not append a duplicate sourceId.
expectedContract.failureHandling: Missing index, duplicate card, or write failure must not fail the verify_task_outcome response.

arguments.task: Verify the descriptor-first self-extension tool was applied, built, and exposed in tools/list.
